title: NIT Trichy Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Project Associate I, II Posts
description: The National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Project Associate I, II Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Electrical, Electronics, and Computer Science Engineering can apply for the NIT Trichy Jobs 2026 . Interested applicants can apply i...
